title: PropertyEscrow Platform - Accessibility Audit Report

recommendations.title: Implement Form Accessibility
recommendations.description: Add aria-required, aria-invalid, and proper error announcements to all forms

recommendations.title: Enhance Color Contrast
recommendations.description: Review all text on gradient backgrounds and ensure WCAG AA compliance

recommendations.title: Add Table Accessibility
recommendations.description: Implement proper table headers with scope attributes for data tables

recommendations.title: Dynamic Content Announcements
recommendations.description: Add aria-live regions for status updates and real-time changes

recommendations.title: Heading Structure Review
recommendations.description: Ensure proper heading hierarchy across all pages

issues.description: Elements must have sufficient color contrast
issues.recommendation: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text, 3:1 for large text

issues.description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
issues.recommendation: Add proper tabindex and keyboard event handlers

issues.description: Interactive elements need accessible names
issues.recommendation: Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attributes

issues.recommendation: Use proper heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3)
